text: User: if I use tenex-edge launch with no channel it should default to the project channnel [...] Assistant: The fix is clear. Currently, no `--channel` with `per_session_rooms=false` (the default) opens the interactive picker. The new behavior: no `--channel` → default to the project root channel; only explicit `--channel ""` opens the picker. [...] Assistant: Clean. `tenex-edge launch <agent>` now defaults to the project root channel; only explicit `--channel ""` opens the picker.
